name: Percy Jackson
description: Rick Riordan's demigod saga spanning Percy Jackson & the Olympians, Heroes of Olympus, and Trials of Apollo

questions.q: Who wrote the Percy Jackson and the Olympians novels?

source.notes: Originally invented the characters as bedtime stories for his son Haley.

questions.q: Who is Percy Jackson's Olympian father?

source.notes: Making Percy a 'forbidden' child of one of the Big Three.

questions.q: What is the name of Percy's sword, which appears as a ballpoint pen in its dormant form?

source.notes: Greek name Anaklusmos; gifted by Chiron, originally belonged to Hercules.

questions.q: What is the title of the first novel in the Percy Jackson series?

source.notes: Published in 2005.

questions.q: Who is Percy's longtime girlfriend, a daughter of Athena?

source.notes: Wants to become an architect; helps design Olympus after The Last Olympian.

questions.q: What is the Long Island summer training camp for Greek demigods called?

source.notes: Located on the North Shore of Long Island; run by Chiron and Dionysus.

questions.q: Percy's loyal satyr best friend is named what?

source.notes: Keeper and later Lord of the Wild after finding Pan.

questions.q: How many novels make up the original Percy Jackson and the Olympians series?

source.notes: Published 2005-2009; followed by spin-off series.

questions.q: Which stolen item is Percy wrongly accused of taking in The Lightning Thief, driving the plot?

source.notes: Luke actually stole both the bolt and the Helm of Darkness under Kronos's influence.

questions.q: In The Sea of Monsters, what legendary object must Percy retrieve to heal Thalia's pine tree?

source.notes: Guarded by the cyclops Polyphemus in the Sea of Monsters (Bermuda Triangle).

questions.q: Who is Percy's Cyclops half-brother, introduced in Book Two?

source.notes: Later becomes a general of the Cyclops army at Poseidon's court.

questions.q: Which Titan Lord serves as the primary villain across the original five books?

source.notes: Possesses Luke Castellan's body to rebuild his form.

questions.q: According to Athena, what is Percy's fatal flaw?

source.notes: She warns he will sacrifice the world to save a friend.

questions.q: In The Trials of Apollo, what mortal name does a humbled Apollo go by?

source.notes: A 16-year-old with acne, cast down by Zeus for his role in HoO.

questions.q: What is the Roman demigod training camp, located near the San Francisco Bay, called?

source.notes: Adjacent to the city of New Rome, where veterans can live as civilians.

questions.q: In The Heroes of Olympus, which primordial goddess threatens to rise and destroy the world?

source.notes: Mother Earth, who stirs the giants against the gods.

questions.q: Who is the son of Hades introduced in The Titan's Curse as a Mythomagic-obsessed kid?

source.notes: Nico's sister Bianca dies in The Titan's Curse, setting up his arc.

questions.q: Which young actor portrays Percy in the 2023 Disney+ live-action series?

source.notes: Logan Lerman played Percy in the 2010 and 2013 films.

questions.q: Which son of Hermes is the primary antagonist throughout much of the original series?

source.notes: Sacrifices himself to kill Kronos in The Last Olympian.

questions.q: Name the cruise ship Luke uses as a mobile base in The Sea of Monsters.

source.notes: Named for the Greek princess chained as a sacrifice to a sea monster.

questions.q: What is the name of Percy's loyal pegasus?

source.notes: Called Percy 'Boss'; rescued from Luke's ship in Book Two.

questions.q: Which Roman emperor serves as the primary villain at the start of The Trials of Apollo?

source.notes: The Beast, part of the Triumvirate Holdings with Commodus and Caligula.
